title: DENTAL PROGRAM - 211info
text: WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-time pediatric dentist, with access to local specialists for emergency referrals. Capable of managing comprehensive patient care in the clinic and coordinating referrals for specialized treatment. Operates a mobile medical and dental bus twice a month at various locations on the Warm Springs Reservation. Offers a range of pediatric specialty programs, including the Silver Nitrate Project for children ages 0–6 with active tooth decay. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-7pm, Wednesday 1pm-7pm, Friday 8am-5pm. Mobile medical and dental bus locations and times vary. (541) 553-1196 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 553-1196 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Must provide proof of tribal enrollment: Tribal ID card or Certificate of Indian Blood AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Cavity Prevention Measures * Native American Community Dental Hygiene * Native American Community Emergency Dental Care * Native American Community Mobile Dental Care * Native American Community Pediatric Dentistry * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER
